title: Cooks, Private Household
description: Prepare meals in private homes. Includes personal chefs.

tasks.text: Peel, wash, trim, and cook vegetables and meats, and bake breads and pastries.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cool, package, label, and freeze foods for later consumption and provide instructions for reheating.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan menus according to employers' needs and diet restrictions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Shop for or order food and kitchen supplies and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare meals in private homes according to employers' recipes or tastes, handling all meals for the family and possibly for other household staff.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Keep records pertaining to menus, finances, and other business-related issues.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Stock, organize, and clean kitchens and cooking utensils.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct the operation and organization of kitchens and all food-related activities, including the presentation and serving of food.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Specialize in preparing fancy dishes or food for special diets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan and prepare food for parties, holiday meals, luncheons, special functions, and other social events.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve meals and snacks to employing families and their guests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Travel with employers to vacation homes to provide meal preparation at those locations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
